meaning: adj.自存的,未创造的,尚未产生的
examples: Electrons cannot be uncreated, they can only be reprogrammed.
Because there is no action performed and because it is uncreated.
I can tell you without a doubt that you will be uncreated by your own choice.
Good brands are a way to achieve the uncreated self and redeem self-love.
To engage a good brand in a deep relationship is synonymous with my becoming my uncreated self, and this is the most profound of choices.
